name: LUMEN_SPECIAL_USER_DASHBOARD_MODEL
purpose: Provide special user dashboards as appropriate while preserving role scope, user boundaries, founder-private protection, localization, accessibility, proof records, and rollback.
founderDashboardMayInclude: website UI and graphic design changes
accessRules: ordinary user dashboard continuity remains available when special modules are added
founder-private records stay founder-only unless explicitly delegated
user-private records stay scoped to that user
cross-user dashboards require explicit governance approval
shared dashboard changes require approval, proof, tests, and rollback
legal/payment/identity/security dashboard controls require heightened approval
